title: lasthenia californica subsp. macrantha
intro: Lasthenia californica subsp. macrantha, also known as giant tarweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lasthenia californica subsp. macrantha include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antiseptic agent. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
